critical_errors.message: arduino-cli is not installed in the analysis environment, so compile success could not be verified.
critical_errors.impact: Cannot confirm successful compilation of sketch and translation units in this environment.

warnings.message: README lists Servo and Wire as required libraries, but source files do not include Servo.h or Wire.h.
warnings.impact: Dependency documentation may be stale or misleading.

warnings.message: Flow and wheel sensors rely on attachInterrupt(digitalPinToInterrupt(pin_)); no runtime check for invalid interrupt mapping.
warnings.impact: If pin mappings are changed for unsupported boards, interrupts may silently fail.

runtime_risks.detail: Sensor begin() functions assume configured pins map to external interrupts.
loop() prints multiple lines every cycle at 115200; on constrained serial readers this can increase loop jitter.

suggested_fixes: Install arduino-cli and run ci/compile-sketch.sh for both FQBNs: arduino:avr:nano and arduino:avr:uno.
Align README dependency list with actual includes or add explicit library usage if intended.
Add static_assert or compile-time pin capability checks for interrupt pins on each supported board.
Optionally gate status telemetry rate to reduce serial overhead.
firmware_upload_without_modification: UNKNOWN (compile verification blocked by missing arduino-cli in environment)
